## Summary

Describe the schema, validator, sequence, migration, adapter, test, or documentation change.

## Compatibility

- Source version:
- Target version:
- Backward-compatible change: yes / no
- Migration required: yes / no

## Verification

- [ ] Added valid and invalid fixtures
- [ ] Ran `python -m unittest -v`
- [ ] Checked single-record validation
- [ ] Checked sequence validation when relevant
- [ ] Checked migration behavior when relevant
- [ ] Confirmed original records are not modified unexpectedly
- [ ] Documented any unsupported or lost fields

## Schema and adapters

- [ ] Shared fields have cross-tool justification
- [ ] Tool-specific data uses an extension namespace
- [ ] Renamed fields include a migration path
- [ ] Adapter changes declare supported versions

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated README or relevant specification
- [ ] Updated migration or compatibility guidance
- [ ] Recorded user-visible behavior changes

## Reviewer notes

List semantic risks, interoperability limits, and follow-up work.
